mapper.insert: insert into visitor_appointment (visit_type, visitor_name, visitor_phone, elder_name, appointment_time, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{visitType}, #{visitorName}, #{visitorPhone}, #{elderName}, #{appointmentTime}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update visitor_appointment set status = #{status}, arrival_time = #{arrivalTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and status = 0
mapper.select:
select id, appointment_id, visit_type, visitor_name, visitor_phone, elder_name, relation_name, visit_time, create_by, create_time, remark from visitor_record
and visitor_name like concat('%', #{visitorName}, '%')
and visitor_phone like concat('%', #{visitorPhone}, '%')
and visit_type = #{visitType}
and visit_time >= #{params.beginTime}
and visit_time <= concat(#{params.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
order by visit_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into visitor_record (appointment_id, visit_type, visitor_name, visitor_phone, elder_name, relation_name, visit_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{appointmentId}, #{visitType}, #{visitorName}, #{visitorPhone}, #{elderName}, #{relationName}, #{visitTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select:
select r.id, r.floor_no, r.room_no, r.bed_no, r.elder_name, r.elder_gender, r.nursing_level, group_concat(c.name order by c.id separator '、') as caregiver_names from nursing_resident r left join nursing_resident_caregiver rc on rc.resident_id = r.id left join nursing_caregiver c on c.id = rc.caregiver_id and c.status = 1
r.status = 1 and r.floor_no = #{floorNo}
and r.elder_name like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%')
group by r.id, r.floor_no, r.room_no, r.bed_no, r.elder_name, r.elder_gender, r.nursing_level order by r.floor_no, r.room_no, r.bed_no
select id, name, phone from nursing_caregiver where status = 1 order by id
mapper.insert: insert into nursing_resident_caregiver(resident_id, caregiver_id, create_by, create_time) values(#{residentId}, #{caregiverId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select (select count(*) from nursing_resident where status = 1) as elderCount, (select count(*) from nursing_resident where status = 1) as bedCount, (select count(*) from nursing_project where status = 1) as serviceCount, (select count(*) from nursing_caregiver where status = 1) as employeeCount, (select count(*) from visitor_appointment where status = 0 and date(appointment_time) = curdate()) as todayAppointments, (select count(*) from visitor_record where date(visit_time) = curdate()) as todayVisits
